dialog.update.title: SecondBrain — Updates
dialog.update.intro: The engine (kit on your PATH) and the desktop app update independently. Choose what to install — your vault, settings and MCP wirings stay intact.
dialog.update.status.launching: Launching installer (look for the UAC prompt)…
dialog.update.status.installed_followup: Installer launched. The tray will be closed automatically; follow the installer to complete the upgrade.
